fields.title: skill-manage: integration tests
fields.description: Plan: docs/plans/2026-03-27-agentic-skill-creation.md — Task 8. Create skill-manager.test.ts — full lifecycle test (create/find/patch/edit/delete) against temp directory. Test security rejection, path traversal, duplicate names.
fields.notes: Added extensions/tau/src/skill-manage/skill-manager.test.ts with 21 SkillManager integration tests covering create/edit/patch/delete/writeFile/removeFile against a temp TAU_SKILLS_DIR. Also added TAU_SKILLS_DIR env override in extensions/tau/src/services/skill-manager.ts for testability. Verification: npx vitest run src/skill-manage/skill-manager.test.ts passed 21/21; npm run gate passed (typecheck + lint + 168/168 tests).
